name: breakout
description: Trades a break outside the recent consolidation range with volume confirmation.
entry_rules: BUY when price closes above the recent range high and volume confirms
SELL when price closes below the recent range low and volume confirms
exit_rules: Skip if breakout direction conflicts with another active strategy
research_notes: This strategy is often strongest after compression and before news volatility.
Future variants can specialize by session or instrument.
